title: VeriSign Inc. (VRSN) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: DCF analysis for VeriSign reflecting its highly predictable, high-margin revenue model driven by its monopoly control over .com and .net domains.

revenueGrowth.rationale: A 5.0% growth rate accounts for the allowed structural price increases offset by slowing organic volume growth in net new domain registrations.

terminalGrowthRate.rationale: Modeled conservatively at 2.0% to reflect mature, utility-like long-term growth constrained by global population and business formation rates.

discountRate.rationale: A low discount rate of 7.5% is applied, reflecting the extremely low risk profile of its regulated, monopoly-driven cash flows.
